title: AndersenLab/nemascan-sims-nf pipeline parameters
description: GWAS simulation pipeline for C. elegans and related nematodes.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

strainfile.description: Tab-separated file (with header) specifying strain groups. Six required columns: group, species, vcf, ms_maf, ms_ld, strains. One row per strain group.

output_dir.description: Output directory name. If omitted, defaults to 'Analysis_Results-{date}'.

db_output.description: Absolute path for the Parquet database directory. Defaults to '{output_dir}/db' when null.

simulation_parameters.title: Simulation parameters
simulation_parameters.description: Parameters controlling the phenotype simulation grid.

nqtl.description: CSV file with number-of-QTL values to simulate, one per line.

h2.description: CSV file with heritability values to simulate, one per line.

reps.description: Number of simulation replicates per parameter combination.

effect.description: CSV file with effect size ranges (e.g. '0.2-0.3'), one per line.

qtlloc.description: BED file (3 columns: chrom, start, end) restricting causal variant placement. Null means whole-genome.

simulate_qtlloc.description: Whether to restrict QTL simulation to the genomic regions specified in --qtlloc.

cv_maf.description: MAF threshold for the causal variant pool. Defaults to each group's ms_maf from the strainfile when null.

cv_ld.description: LD R² pruning threshold for the causal variant pool.

analysis_parameters.title: Analysis parameters
analysis_parameters.description: Parameters controlling QTL detection and significance thresholds.

sthresh.description: Significance threshold method. 'BF' for Bonferroni, 'EIGEN' for eigenvalue correction, or a numeric string (e.g. '4' for -log10p > 4).

alpha.description: Significance level for Bonferroni and EIGEN threshold calculation.

group_qtl.description: Maximum base-pair distance between two QTL peaks to merge them into one interval.

ci_size.description: Number of flanking SNVs on each side of the peak marker defining the QTL confidence interval.

sparse_cut.description: Off-diagonal GRM values above this threshold are set to zero (sparsity cutoff).

mito_name.description: Name of the mitochondrial chromosome to exclude from GWA mapping.

legacy_assess.description: Run the legacy R-based QTL interval and assessment chain in parallel with the DB path. Used for cross-validation.
